phrases.intent_en: I would like to visit the garden, please.
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais visiter le jardin, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY vee-zee-TAY luh zhar-DAN, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Created by Lawrence Johnston (who also made Hidcote in England), Serre de la Madone is one of the finest gardens on the Riviera. Booking ahead is recommended.

phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a une visite guidée ?
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours are available and highly recommended — the garden's history and plant collection are fascinating.

responses.phonetic: wee, luh dee-MAHNSH ah kah-TORZ UHR
responses.french: Oui, le dimanche à quatorze heures.

phrases.intent_en: Which plants are in bloom right now?
phrases.text_local: Quelles plantes sont en fleur en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel PLONT son on FLUR on suh moh-MON
phrases.cultural_note: The garden has year-round interest but spring (March–May) is spectacular for wisteria, roses, and rare perennials.

responses.english: The camellias and citrus right now.
responses.phonetic: lay kah-may-LYAH ay layz ah-GROOM ahn suh moh-MAHN
responses.french: Les camélias et les agrumes en ce moment.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the garden requires advance booking
phrases.text_local: Faut-il réserver à l'avance pour visiter le jardin ?
phrases.pronunciation: foh-TEEL ray-zur-VAY ah lah-VAHNS poor vee-zee-TAY luh zhar-DAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Jardin Serre de la Madone was created by Lawrence Johnston, who also designed Hidcote; it is one of the finest botanic gardens on the Riviera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what is in bloom at this time of year
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qui est en fleur en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: kes kee ay tahn FLUR ahn suh moh-MAHN

responses.english: Ask at reception, it changes each month.
responses.phonetic: rahn-sen-YAY-voo ah lah-KUY, sah shahnzh shahk MWAH.
responses.french: Renseignez-vous à l'accueil, ça change chaque mois.
